name: causal-order
description: An event integrity library for ordering and analyzing distributed events without false certainty.
author: Gazali Ahmad

scripts.docs:sync:check: npm run build && npm run docs:check && npm run examples:check
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run docs:sync:check && npm run bench:check
scripts.examples: npm run build && npm run examples:check
scripts.bench: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --profile baseline-100k-shuffled
scripts.bench:stream: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --profile streaming-100k-plateaus
scripts.bench:csv: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --all --out perf/results/latest.csv
scripts.bench:stream:cycles: npm run build && node perf/endurance.mjs --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --repeat 12
scripts.bench:stream:long: npm run build && node perf/endurance.mjs --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --duration-ms 60000
scripts.bench:stream:correction:cycles: npm run build && node perf/endurance.mjs --profile streaming-150k-correction-churn --repeat 6 --warmup 0
scripts.bench:stream:reconnect:cycles: npm run build && node perf/endurance.mjs --profile streaming-150k-anomaly-heavy-reconnect --repeat 6 --warmup 0
scripts.bench:stream:heap: npm run build && node perf/constrained-heap.mjs --heap-mb 256 --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --repeat 6
scripts.bench:stream:heap:small: npm run build && node perf/constrained-heap.mjs --heap-mb 128 --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --repeat 3 --warmup 0
scripts.bench:stream:gc: npm run build && node perf/gc-observed.mjs --heap-mb 256 --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --repeat 6
scripts.bench:stream:gc:small: npm run build && node perf/gc-observed.mjs --heap-mb 128 --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag --repeat 3 --warmup 0
scripts.bench:confidence:150k: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --profile baseline-150k-shuffled --profile streaming-150k-watermark-lag
scripts.bench:confidence:250k: npm run build && node perf/run.mjs --profile baseline-250k-shuffled --profile streaming-250k-watermark-lag
